title: OMG
why_this_song: OMG by Usher (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Oh my gosh"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Baby let me-"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You make me want to say"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Honey got a booty like pow, pow, pow"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "There's so many ways to love ya"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I did it again, so I'ma let the beat drop
You make me want to say
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
I fell in love with shawty when I seen her on the dance floor
She was dancing sexy, pop, pop, popping, dropping, dropping low

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gosh" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gosh" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Honey like a supermodel; my, oh my

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "OMG" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "OMG", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "OMG" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "OMG" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "OMG", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "OMG", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
